name: chisel
description: Design system studio for frontend interfaces. Shape direction, carve tokens, exhibit components, inspect consistency.

commands.name: shape
commands.description: Start a new design system — direction, tokens, component showcase
commands.argument_hint: Optional: what you're building (e.g. "admin dashboard", "analytics app")

commands.name: exhibit
commands.description: Regenerate the component showcase from current design system

commands.name: carve
commands.description: Tweak design tokens — preview in showcase, then propagate
commands.argument_hint: What to change (e.g. "warmer palette", "rounder buttons", "smaller text")

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Audit all frontend code against the design system
